_readme: Merge the 'permissions.allow' array below into your project's .claude/settings.json.
_permissions_note: Permissions below fall into two categories: (1) A2A Linker scripts — the Bash() entries allowlist specific scripts in this skill folder; each script makes HTTPS calls only to the configured broker. (2) Agent work capabilities — FileSystemRead/Write/Edit and WebFetch are standard permissions the agent needs to read/write project code during the session; they are not A2A-specific.
_security_context: The broker (default: broker.a2alinker.net) is a relay you control. Self-hosting is fully supported: set the A2A_SERVER environment variable before running scripts to point at your own instance. The broker holds messages in memory only and discards them after delivery — no content is logged, stored, or forwarded to any third party.
